title: Equatorial
body:
🗯 About

Equatorial is a mod that adds Equatorial Forests and their variations. In the new biomes you will see the most beautiful and diverse flora and fauna. In the Equatorial Forest you can meet three new types of wood: Equatorial palm, palm and ceiba (cotton tree).

Attention! For the normal operation of models of many blocks from the mod, it is necessary to install an Optifine! Otherwise, almost everything in the biome will be filled with missing textures.

🖼 Screenshots

There are many more interesting things in mod, you should see everything yourself!


👾 Our Discord Server

Come and help us make our mods better. Find bugs and errors together with us, offer interesting ideas. We will be able to implement them
